<script>
var cbnnr = cbnnr || {};

cbnnr.rewrite_url = function() {
  url = '';
  rimg = '';
  switchlang ='';
  switch(Geo.country) {

   case 'XX':
     url = 'https://www.wikilovesmonuments.org/?pk_campaign=Centralnotice';
     break;

  }
 if(url!='') $("a.cbnnr-message").attr("href",url);
 if(rimg!='') $(".cbnnr-rightimg img").css('display', 'block');
 if(rimg!='') $(".cbnnr-rightimg img").attr('src', rimg);
 if(rimg!='') $(".cbnnr-rightimg").addClass("cbnnr-rightimgshow");
 if(rimg!='') $(".cbnnr-message").addClass("cbnnr-message-rimg");
 if(switchlang!='') $(".cbnnr-text").html(switchlang);
}

cbnnr.show = function() {
    $('.cbnnr').css('display', 'block');
};

$(function() {


    if ( !mw.centralNotice.bannerData.hideResult ) {
        cbnnr.rewrite_url();
        cbnnr.show();
    }

});

					<div id="mw-content-text" class="mw-body-content"><div class="mw-content-ltr mw-parser-output" lang="dag" dir="ltr" data-mw-parsoid-version="0.22.0.0-alpha24" data-mw-html-version="2.8.0"><section data-mw-section-id="0" id="mwAQ"><meta property="mw:PageProp/notoc" id="mwAg">
<center id="mwAw"><table style="margin-top:10px; background:none;" about="#mwt1" typeof="mw:Transclusion" id="mwBA" data-mw="{"parts":[{"template":{"target":{"wt":"Top Banner","href":"./Tɛmplet:Top_Banner"},"params":{},"i":0}}]}">
<tbody><tr><td style="width:65%; border:1px solid #a7d7f9; vertical-align:top; color:#000; padding: 0px 10px 10px 0px; -moz-border-radius: 10px; -webkit-border-radius: 10px; border-radius:10px;">
<table style="width:280px; border:none; background:none;">
<tbody><tr><td style="width:280px; text-align:center; white-space:nowrap; color:#000;">

<div style="font-size:182%; border:none; margin:0; padding:.1em; color:#000;">Ni A Paabu Na 
<figure class="mw-halign-left" typeof="mw:File"><a href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lahabali_kɔligu:Wikipedia-logo-v2-dag.svg" class="mw-file-description"><img resource="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lahabali_kɔligu:Wikipedia-logo-v2-dag.svg" src="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/67/Wikipedia-logo-v2-dag.svg/180px-Wikipedia-logo-v2-dag.svg.png" decoding="async" data-file-width="135" data-file-height="155" data-file-type="drawing" height="207" width="180" srcset="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/67/Wikipedia-logo-v2-dag.svg/270px-Wikipedia-logo-v2-dag.svg.png 1.5x, //upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/67/Wikipedia-logo-v2-dag.svg/360px-Wikipedia-logo-v2-dag.svg.png 2x" class="mw-file-element"></a><figcaption></figcaption></figure>
<a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipidia" title="Wikipidia">Wikipidia</a>!</div>
<div style="top:+0.2em; font-size:130%;">Baŋsim bayana kundi sokam ni tooi tɔhisabi.</div>
<div id="articlecount" style="font-size:120%;">Lahabaya <b><a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Diŋ'gahim:Statistics" title="Diŋ'gahim:Statistics">24,269</a></b> m-be <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dagbanli" title="Dagbanli">Dagbanli</a> bayana kundi ŋɔ ni.</div> 

<div class="center">
<p><a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Baŋsim_dunoli:Alaafei_mini_Tilahi" title="Baŋsim dunoli:Alaafei mini Tilahi">Alaafei mini Tilahi</a> — <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pubu:Ninsala_buɣusibu" title="Pubu:Ninsala buɣusibu">Daadam biɛhagu</a> — <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Baŋsim_dunoli:Salya_karibu" title="Baŋsim dunoli:Salya karibu">Salya karibu</a> — <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Baŋsim_dunoli:Saŋmarisi_baŋsim" title="Baŋsim dunoli:Saŋmarisi baŋsim">Saŋmarisi baŋsim</a></p>
</div>
<div class="center">
<p><a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Baŋsim_dunoli:So_biɛhigu_karuŋ?action=edit&redlink=1" title="Baŋsim dunoli:So biɛhigu karuŋ (yaɣili ŋɔ maa kani)" class="new" typeof="mw:LocalizedAttrs" data-mw-i18n="{"title":{"lang":"x-page","key":"red-link-title","params":["Baŋsim dunoli:So biɛhigu karuŋ"]}}">So biɛhigu karuŋ</a> — <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Baŋsim_dunoli:Kurimbuni_yɛltoɣa" title="Baŋsim dunoli:Kurimbuni yɛltoɣa">Kurimbuni yɛltoɣa</a> — <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Baŋsim_dunoli:Tabibi?action=edit&redlink=1" title="Baŋsim dunoli:Tabibi (yaɣili ŋɔ maa kani)" class="new" typeof="mw:LocalizedAttrs" data-mw-i18n="{"title":{"lang":"x-page","key":"red-link-title","params":["Baŋsim dunoli:Tabibi"]}}">Tabibi</a> — <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Baŋsim_dunoli:Tabibi_baŋsim?action=edit&redlink=1" title="Baŋsim dunoli:Tabibi baŋsim (yaɣili ŋɔ maa kani)" class="new" typeof="mw:LocalizedAttrs" data-mw-i18n="{"title":{"lang":"x-page","key":"red-link-title","params":["Baŋsim dunoli:Tabibi baŋsim"]}}">Tabibi baŋsim</a></p> 
</div>
<div class="center">
<p>Kundi ŋɔ lahi mali: <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kpiɛriti?action=edit&redlink=1" title="Kpiɛriti (yaɣili ŋɔ maa kani)" class="new" typeof="mw:LocalizedAttrs" data-mw-i18n="{"title":{"lang":"x-page","key":"red-link-title","params":["Kpiɛriti"]}}">Kpiɛriti</a> — <a rel="mw:ExtLink" href="https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Di%C5%8B%27gahim:AllPages?from=&to=&namespace=104" class="external text">Salima</a> — <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pubu:Shɛhira_gbaŋ" title="Pubu:Shɛhira gbaŋ">Shɛhira gbana</a> — <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yɛltɔɣataɣamalisi" title="Yɛltɔɣataɣamalisi" class="mw-redirect">Yɛltɔɣataɣamalisi</a></p>
</div>
<div class="left">
<p><b>- <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Diŋ'gahim:AllPages" title="Diŋ'gahim:AllPages">Lahabaya Zaa</a> -</b></p>
</div></td></tr>
</tbody></table></td></tr>
</tbody></table></center>

<div class="mw-inputbox-centered" style="" typeof="mw:Extension/inputbox mw:Transclusion" about="#mwt2" id="mwBQ" data-mw="{"name":"inputbox","attrs":{},"body":{"extsrc":"type=search2\n type=create\n buttonlabel=Pilimi lahabali palli\n width=50\n bgcolor=#\n preload=Template:Standard content for new page\n editintro=\n default=\n"},"parts":[{"template":{"target":{"wt":"Create New Article","href":"./Tɛmplet:Create_New_Article"},"params":{},"i":0}}]}"><form name="createbox" class="createbox mw-inputbox-form" action="/w/index.php" method="get"><input type="hidden" value="edit" name="action"><input type="hidden" value="Template:Standard content for new page" name="preload"><input type="hidden" name="editintro"><div class="cdx-text-input"><input name="title" class="mw-inputbox-input mw-inputbox-createbox cdx-text-input__input" placeholder="" required="" size="50" dir="ltr"></div><br><input type="submit" name="create" value="Pilimi lahabali palli" class="cdx-button cdx-button--action-progressive cdx-button--weight-primary"></form></div>
<table style="margin-top:10px; background:none;" about="#mwt4" typeof="mw:Transclusion" id="mwBg" data-mw="{"parts":[{"template":{"target":{"wt":"Feature Articles All","href":"./Tɛmplet:Feature_Articles_All"},"params":{},"i":0}},"\n\n[[Pubu:Solɔɣu]]"]}">
<tbody><tr><td style="width:65%; border:1px solid #a7d7f9; vertical-align:top; color:#000; padding: 0px 10px 10px 0px; -moz-border-radius: 10px; -webkit-border-radius: 10px; border-radius:10px;">

<table cellpadding="2" cellspacing="5" style="width:100%; vertical-align:top; background:transparent;">
<tbody><tr><td>
<div style="text-align:left; position:relative; left:4px; top:2px; margin:0;">
<p><span class="mw-default-size" typeof="mw:File"><span><img alt="" resource="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lahabali_kɔligu:Bluebg_rounded.png" src="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/4/46/Bluebg_rounded.png" decoding="async" data-file-width="350" data-file-height="25" data-file-type="bitmap" height="25" width="350" class="mw-file-element"></span></span></p>
<div style="position:absolute; left:5px; top:-6px;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img alt="" resource="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lahabali_kɔligu:HSutvald2.svg" src="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/f/fd/HSutvald2.svg/40px-HSutvald2.svg.png" decoding="async" data-file-width="156" data-file-height="156" data-file-type="drawing" height="38" width="38" srcset="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/f/fd/HSutvald2.svg/60px-HSutvald2.svg.png 1.5x, //upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/f/fd/HSutvald2.svg/120px-HSutvald2.svg.png 2x" class="mw-file-element"></span></span></div>
<div style="position:absolute; left:40px; top:-5px;"><div style="font-weight:bold; border-bottom:none; font-size:130%; padding:.15em .4em;">Asanza Lahabali</div></div></div>
<div style="padding-left:10px; padding-bottom:5px; padding-top:2px; font-size:100%">
<figure class="mw-halign-right" typeof="mw:File/Thumb"><a href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lahabali_kɔligu:A_Dagomba_couple_from_farm_01.jpg" class="mw-file-description"><img resource="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lahabali_kɔligu:A_Dagomba_couple_from_farm_01.jpg" src="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/6f/A_Dagomba_couple_from_farm_01.jpg/250px-A_Dagomba_couple_from_farm_01.jpg" decoding="async" data-file-width="935" data-file-height="1342" data-file-type="bitmap" height="359" width="250" srcset="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/6f/A_Dagomba_couple_from_farm_01.jpg/330px-A_Dagomba_couple_from_farm_01.jpg 1.5x, //upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/6f/A_Dagomba_couple_from_farm_01.jpg/500px-A_Dagomba_couple_from_farm_01.jpg 2x" class="mw-file-element"></a><figcaption>Paɣa ni Doo</figcaption></figure>
<p><b><a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dagbamba" title="Dagbamba">Dagbamba</a></b> nyɛla zuliya ban be <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Northern_Region" title="Northern Region">tudu yaɣili</a>. Dagbamba ni yɛri bal'shɛli n nyɛ dagbanli. Bɛ mini <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mohi_mini_Dagbamba" title="Mohi mini Dagbamba">Mohi</a> kpɛriti pam (dachɛhi n nyɛ ba). Dagbamba Naa n-nyɛ <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ndan_Yaa_Naa" title="Ndan Yaa Naa">Yaa naa</a>, ŋuni nyɛ dagbaŋ'na zuɣu ŋun be Naya-Sankarayili(<a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yendi_Municipality" title="Yendi Municipality">Yendi</a>) n-lɛhiri Nabihi dagbaŋ.
Dagbamba mali <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yuya_salima" title="Yuya salima">yu'gahinda</a> pam ka di mali salima.
Be mali tuma balibu pam ka bi booni li <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Daan'_kali_tuma" title="Daan' kali tuma">Daan' kali tuma</a>
<a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dagbaŋ_Tiŋsi_Yuya_ni_di_Salima" title="Dagbaŋ Tiŋsi Yuya ni di Salima">Dagbaŋ tiŋsi</a> zaa mali la di yuya ni di Salima ni <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dagbaŋ_tinsi_mini_di_dahi_yuya" title="Dagbaŋ tinsi mini di dahi yuya">dahi</a>.
Be mali <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bindirigu" title="Bindirigu">bindiri'</a> suma ni <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Senior_High_Schools_Din_Be_Ghana" title="Senior High Schools Din Be Ghana">shikuru</a> gahinda.
 </p><a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dagbamba" title="Dagbamba">...Karimmi pahi</a><div align="right" style="font-size:95%;"><a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Featured_Articles?action=edit&redlink=1" title="Wikipedia:Featured Articles (yaɣili ŋɔ maa kani)" class="new" typeof="mw:LocalizedAttrs" data-mw-i18n="{"title":{"lang":"x-page","key":"red-link-title","params":["Wikipedia:Featured Articles"]}}">Asanza lahabaya di pun gari</a></div></div>

<figure class="mw-halign-right" typeof="mw:File/Thumb"><a href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lahabali_kɔligu:A_dagomba_man_dancing_baamaya.jpg" class="mw-file-description"><img resource="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lahabali_kɔligu:A_dagomba_man_dancing_baamaya.jpg" src="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/7/77/A_dagomba_man_dancing_baamaya.jpg/250px-A_dagomba_man_dancing_baamaya.jpg" decoding="async" data-file-width="1620" data-file-height="2317" data-file-type="bitmap" height="358" width="250" srcset="//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/7/77/A_dagomba_man_dancing_baamaya.jpg/330px-A_dagomba_man_dancing_baamaya.jpg 1.5x, //upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/7/77/A_dagomba_man_dancing_baamaya.jpg/500px-A_dagomba_man_dancing_baamaya.jpg 2x" class="mw-file-element"></a><figcaption>Baamaaya</figcaption></figure>
<p><b>Bagabaga College of Education</b>(bɛ ni daa mi shɛli <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bagabaga_Training_College" title="Bagabaga Training College">Bagabaga Training College</a>, bee BATCO la) nyɛla <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Karimzɔŋ" title="Karimzɔŋ">karimzɔŋ</a> karili din be <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tamali" title="Tamali">Tamale</a> (<a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sagnarigu_Municipality" title="Sagnarigu Municipality">Sagnarigu Municipality</a>, <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Northern_Region" title="Northern Region">Northern region</a>, Ghana) n-wumisiri karimbanimaKarimzɔŋ maa nyɛla din be <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Northern_Region" title="Northern Region">Northern</a> zone la ni. Di nyɛla Ghana <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tiŋgbani" title="Tiŋgbani">tingbani</a> ŋɔ ni karimbanima karim zɔndi din kalinli yiɣisi kaman pihinahi ni ayɔbu (46) la puuni yini. <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Silimiingoli" title="Silimiingoli">Silimiingoli</a> January biɛɣu pihita ni yini dali (31 st),1944 yuuni ka bɛ daa kpa lala karimzɔŋ ŋɔ. Bɛ daa zaŋ la <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Shikuru" title="Shikuru">shikurubihi</a> pia ni ayopɔin (17) m-pili [[shikuru ŋɔ, ka zaŋ tɛhisuma din nyɛ <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Baŋsim_dunoli:Alaafei_mini_Tilahi" title="Baŋsim dunoli:Alaafei mini Tilahi">baŋsim</a> lɛbu dini ni di che ka bɛ lee <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Karimba_nima_dabisili" title="Karimba nima dabisili">karimba</a> maŋa n-wuhiri m mayaankalɛhi shikuriti. Bagabaga College of Education nyɛla shikuru shɛli din ba daansi ni <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sagnarigu_Municipal_Education" title="Sagnarigu Municipal Education">Sagnarigu Municipal Education</a> duu la yaɣili ni <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tamale_Senior_High_School" title="Tamale Senior High School">Tamale Senior High School</a> nti pahi Tamale Technical University karimzɔŋ kara la. <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bagabaga_College_of_Education" title="Bagabaga College of Education">Bagabaga College of Education</a> (BACE), <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tamale_Technical_University" title="Tamale Technical University">Tamale Technical University</a> <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/(TaTU)?action=edit&redlink=1" title="(TaTU) (yaɣili ŋɔ maa kani)" class="new" typeof="mw:LocalizedAttrs" data-mw-i18n="{"title":{"lang":"x-page","key":"red-link-title","params":["(TaTU)"]}}">(TaTU)</a>, <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tamale_College_of_Education(TACE)" title="Tamale College of Education(TACE)" class="mw-redirect">Tamale College of Education (TACE)</a>, <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bagabaga_Demonstration_KG/PRIMARY/JHS" title="Bagabaga Demonstration KG/PRIMARY/JHS">Bagabaga Demonstration KG/PRIMARY/JHS</a> zaa ka bɛ laɣim boli <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Education_Ridge" title="Education Ridge">Education Ridge</a> la <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sagnarigu_Municipality" title="Sagnarigu Municipality">Sagnarigu</a> yaɣili la. <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bagabaga_College_of_Education" title="Bagabaga College of Education">Bagabaga College of Education</a> nyɛla karimzɔŋ shɛli din bɛ <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/University_of_Education,_Winneba" title="University of Education, Winneba">University of Education, Winnebanima</a> fukumsi ni. <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bagabaga_College_of_Education" title="Bagabaga College of Education">Bagabaga College of Education</a> nyɛla karimzɔŋ shɛli ban wumsi karimbanima pam ka bɛ be bolli ni yiɣ'jam yaɣili <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Northern_Region" title="Northern Region">Northern</a> tudu yaɣili. <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="//dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bagabaga_College_of_Education" title="Bagabaga College of Education">Bagabaga College of Education</a> nyɛla ban kpaŋdi bɛ maŋ pam zaŋ chaŋ karimba mini karimmanima bɔhimbu polo</p>

    - Lahabaya Zaa -


    Asanza Lahabali

    Dagbamba nyɛla zuliya ban be tudu yaɣili. Dagbamba ni yɛri bal'shɛli n nyɛ dagbanli. Bɛ mini Mohi kpɛriti pam (dachɛhi n nyɛ ba). Dagbamba Naa n-nyɛ Yaa naa, ŋuni nyɛ dagbaŋ'na zuɣu ŋun be Naya-Sankarayili(Yendi) n-lɛhiri Nabihi dagbaŋ. Dagbamba mali yu'gahinda pam ka di mali salima. Be mali tuma balibu pam ka bi booni li Daan' kali tuma Dagbaŋ tiŋsi zaa mali la di yuya ni di Salima ni dahi. Be mali bindiri' suma ni shikuru gahinda.

    ...Karimmi pahi
    Asanza lahabaya di pun gari

    Lahabali Din Gahim

    Bagabaga College of Education(bɛ ni daa mi shɛli Bagabaga Training College, bee BATCO la) nyɛla karimzɔŋ karili din be Tamale (Sagnarigu Municipality, Northern region, Ghana) n-wumisiri karimbanimaKarimzɔŋ maa nyɛla din be Northern zone la ni. Di nyɛla Ghana tingbani ŋɔ ni karimbanima karim zɔndi din kalinli yiɣisi kaman pihinahi ni ayɔbu (46) la puuni yini. Silimiingoli January biɛɣu pihita ni yini dali (31 st),1944 yuuni ka bɛ daa kpa lala karimzɔŋ ŋɔ. Bɛ daa zaŋ la shikurubihi pia ni ayopɔin (17) m-pili [[shikuru ŋɔ, ka zaŋ tɛhisuma din nyɛ baŋsim lɛbu dini ni di che ka bɛ lee karimba maŋa n-wuhiri m mayaankalɛhi shikuriti. Bagabaga College of Education nyɛla shikuru shɛli din ba daansi ni Sagnarigu Municipal Education duu la yaɣili ni Tamale Senior High School nti pahi Tamale Technical University karimzɔŋ kara la. Bagabaga College of Education (BACE), Tamale Technical University (TaTU), Tamale College of Education (TACE), Bagabaga Demonstration KG/PRIMARY/JHS zaa ka bɛ laɣim boli Education Ridge la Sagnarigu yaɣili la. Bagabaga College of Education nyɛla karimzɔŋ shɛli din bɛ University of Education, Winnebanima fukumsi ni. Bagabaga College of Education nyɛla karimzɔŋ shɛli ban wumsi karimbanima pam ka bɛ be bolli ni yiɣ'jam yaɣili Northern tudu yaɣili. Bagabaga College of Education nyɛla ban kpaŋdi bɛ maŋ pam zaŋ chaŋ karimba mini karimmanima bɔhimbu polo

    ......Karimmi pahi

    • Ghana Senior High School (GHANASCO) nyɛla bi’kura karim zɔŋ shɛli din be Tamali Northern Region, Ghana tiŋgban ni ka n-nyɛ yuun' pihi yɔbu?

images.desc:
Paɣa ni Doo
Dagbamba nyɛla zuliya ban be tudu yaɣili. Dagbamba ni yɛri bal'shɛli n nyɛ dagbanli. Bɛ mini Mohi kpɛriti pam (dachɛhi n nyɛ ba). Dagbamba Naa n-nyɛ Yaa naa, ŋuni nyɛ dagbaŋ'na zuɣu ŋun be Naya-Sankarayili(Yendi) n-lɛhiri Nabihi dagbaŋ.
Dagbamba mali yu'gahinda pam ka di mali salima.
Be mali tuma balibu pam ka bi booni li Daan' kali tuma
Dagbaŋ tiŋsi zaa mali la di yuya ni di Salima ni dahi.
Be mali bindiri' suma ni shikuru gahinda.
 ...Karimmi pahiAsanza lahabaya di pun gari

Baamaaya
Bagabaga College of Education(bɛ ni daa mi shɛli Bagabaga Training College, bee BATCO la) nyɛla karimzɔŋ karili din be Tamale (Sagnarigu Municipality, Northern region, Ghana) n-wumisiri karimbanimaKarimzɔŋ maa nyɛla din be Northern zone la ni. Di nyɛla Ghana tingbani ŋɔ ni karimbanima karim zɔndi din kalinli yiɣisi kaman pihinahi ni ayɔbu (46) la puuni yini. Silimiingoli January biɛɣu pihita ni yini dali (31 st),1944 yuuni ka bɛ daa kpa lala karimzɔŋ ŋɔ. Bɛ daa zaŋ la shikurubihi pia ni ayopɔin (17) m-pili [[shikuru ŋɔ, ka zaŋ tɛhisuma din nyɛ baŋsim lɛbu dini ni di che ka bɛ lee karimba maŋa n-wuhiri m mayaankalɛhi shikuriti. Bagabaga College of Education nyɛla shikuru shɛli din ba daansi ni Sagnarigu Municipal Education duu la yaɣili ni Tamale Senior High School nti pahi Tamale Technical University karimzɔŋ kara la. Bagabaga College of Education (BACE), Tamale Technical University (TaTU), Tamale College of Education (TACE), Bagabaga Demonstration KG/PRIMARY/JHS zaa ka bɛ laɣim boli Education Ridge la Sagnarigu yaɣili la. Bagabaga College of Education nyɛla karimzɔŋ shɛli din bɛ University of Education, Winnebanima fukumsi ni. Bagabaga College of Education nyɛla karimzɔŋ shɛli ban wumsi karimbanima pam ka bɛ be bolli ni yiɣ'jam yaɣili Northern tudu yaɣili. Bagabaga College of Education nyɛla ban kpaŋdi bɛ maŋ pam zaŋ chaŋ karimba mini karimmanima bɔhimbu polo
......Karimmi pahiAsanza lahabaya di pun gari

Alikuraan 
Alikuraan muni bɛla ti Dagbani Wikipedia ŋɔ zuɣu?
Dagbaŋ kurili saha yuya galisiya pam?
Anabi Mahamaru nyɛla ninvuɣ'so ŋun nyɛ Anabinima bahigu. O laribu yuli n-nyɛ Aḥmad, Abū al-Qāsim Muḥammad ibn ʿAbd Allāh ibn ʿAbd al-Muṭṭalib ibn Hāshim Mahamaru ka be daa siɣsi Al Kurani n-ti?
Ghana Senior High School  (GHANASCO) nyɛla bi’kura karim zɔŋ shɛli din be Tamali Northern Region, Ghana tiŋgban ni ka n-nyɛ yuun' pihi yɔbu?Asanza lahabaya di pun gari

Diyila Dagbani Wikipedia
|  Ni A Paabu Na [![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/67/Wikipedia-logo-v2-dag.svg/180px-Wikipedia-logo-v2-dag.svg.png)](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lahabali_k%C9%94ligu:Wikipedia-logo-v2-dag.svg) [Wikipidia](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipidia "Wikipidia")! Baŋsim bayana kundi sokam ni tooi tɔhisabi. Lahabaya **[24,269](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Di%C5%8B'gahim:Statistics "Diŋ'gahim:Statistics")** m-be [Dagbanli](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dagbanli "Dagbanli") bayana kundi ŋɔ ni. [Alaafei mini Tilahi](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ba%C5%8Bsim_dunoli:Alaafei_mini_Tilahi "Baŋsim dunoli:Alaafei mini Tilahi") — [Daadam biɛhagu](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pubu:Ninsala_bu%C9%A3usibu "Pubu:Ninsala buɣusibu") — [Salya karibu](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ba%C5%8Bsim_dunoli:Salya_karibu "Baŋsim dunoli:Salya karibu") — [Saŋmarisi baŋsim](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ba%C5%8Bsim_dunoli:Sa%C5%8Bmarisi_ba%C5%8Bsim "Baŋsim dunoli:Saŋmarisi baŋsim") [So biɛhigu karuŋ](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ba%C5%8Bsim_dunoli:So_bi%C9%9Bhigu_karu%C5%8B?action=edit&redlink=1 "Baŋsim dunoli:So biɛhigu karuŋ \(yaɣili ŋɔ maa kani\)") — [Kurimbuni yɛltoɣa](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ba%C5%8Bsim_dunoli:Kurimbuni_y%C9%9Blto%C9%A3a "Baŋsim dunoli:Kurimbuni yɛltoɣa") — [Tabibi](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ba%C5%8Bsim_dunoli:Tabibi?action=edit&redlink=1 "Baŋsim dunoli:Tabibi \(yaɣili ŋɔ maa kani\)") — [Tabibi baŋsim](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ba%C5%8Bsim_dunoli:Tabibi_ba%C5%8Bsim?action=edit&redlink=1 "Baŋsim dunoli:Tabibi baŋsim \(yaɣili ŋɔ maa kani\)") Kundi ŋɔ lahi mali: [Kpiɛriti](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kpi%C9%9Briti?action=edit&redlink=1 "Kpiɛriti \(yaɣili ŋɔ maa kani\)") — [Salima](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Di%C5%8B%27gahim:AllPages?from=&to=&namespace=104) — [Shɛhira gbana](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pubu:Sh%C9%9Bhira_gba%C5%8B "Pubu:Shɛhira gbaŋ") — [Yɛltɔɣataɣamalisi](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Y%C9%9Blt%C9%94%C9%A3ata%C9%A3amalisi "Yɛltɔɣataɣamalisi") **-[Lahabaya Zaa](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Di%C5%8B'gahim:AllPages "Diŋ'gahim:AllPages") -**  
---  
  

|  ![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/4/46/Bluebg_rounded.png) ![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/f/fd/HSutvald2.svg/40px-HSutvald2.svg.png) Asanza Lahabali [![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/6f/A_Dagomba_couple_from_farm_01.jpg/250px-A_Dagomba_couple_from_farm_01.jpg)](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lahabali_k%C9%94ligu:A_Dagomba_couple_from_farm_01.jpg)Paɣa ni Doo **[Dagbamba](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dagbamba "Dagbamba")** nyɛla zuliya ban be [tudu yaɣili](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Northern_Region "Northern Region"). Dagbamba ni yɛri bal'shɛli n nyɛ dagbanli. Bɛ mini [Mohi](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mohi_mini_Dagbamba "Mohi mini Dagbamba") kpɛriti pam (dachɛhi n nyɛ ba). Dagbamba Naa n-nyɛ [Yaa naa](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ndan_Yaa_Naa "Ndan Yaa Naa"), ŋuni nyɛ dagbaŋ'na zuɣu ŋun be Naya-Sankarayili([Yendi](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yendi_Municipality "Yendi Municipality")) n-lɛhiri Nabihi dagbaŋ. Dagbamba mali [yu'gahinda](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yuya_salima "Yuya salima") pam ka di mali salima. Be mali tuma balibu pam ka bi booni li [Daan' kali tuma](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Daan'_kali_tuma "Daan' kali tuma") [Dagbaŋ tiŋsi](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dagba%C5%8B_Ti%C5%8Bsi_Yuya_ni_di_Salima "Dagbaŋ Tiŋsi Yuya ni di Salima") zaa mali la di yuya ni di Salima ni [dahi](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dagba%C5%8B_tinsi_mini_di_dahi_yuya "Dagbaŋ tinsi mini di dahi yuya"). Be mali [bindiri'](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bindirigu "Bindirigu") suma ni [shikuru](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Senior_High_Schools_Din_Be_Ghana "Senior High Schools Din Be Ghana") gahinda.  [...Karimmi pahi](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dagbamba "Dagbamba")[Asanza lahabaya di pun gari](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Featured_Articles?action=edit&redlink=1 "Wikipedia:Featured Articles \(yaɣili ŋɔ maa kani\)") ![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/4/46/Bluebg_rounded.png) ![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/7/7e/HSbra2.svg/40px-HSbra2.svg.png) Lahabali Din Gahim [![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/7/77/A_dagomba_man_dancing_baamaya.jpg/250px-A_dagomba_man_dancing_baamaya.jpg)](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lahabali_k%C9%94ligu:A_dagomba_man_dancing_baamaya.jpg)Baamaaya **Bagabaga College of Education**(bɛ ni daa mi shɛli [Bagabaga Training College](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bagabaga_Training_College "Bagabaga Training College"), bee BATCO la) nyɛla [karimzɔŋ](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Karimz%C9%94%C5%8B "Karimzɔŋ") karili din be [Tamale](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tamali "Tamali") ([Sagnarigu Municipality](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sagnarigu_Municipality "Sagnarigu Municipality"), [Northern region](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Northern_Region "Northern Region"), Ghana) n-wumisiri karimbanimaKarimzɔŋ maa nyɛla din be [Northern](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Northern_Region "Northern Region") zone la ni. Di nyɛla Ghana [tingbani](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ti%C5%8Bgbani "Tiŋgbani") ŋɔ ni karimbanima karim zɔndi din kalinli yiɣisi kaman pihinahi ni ayɔbu (46) la puuni yini. [Silimiingoli](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Silimiingoli "Silimiingoli") January biɛɣu pihita ni yini dali (31 st),1944 yuuni ka bɛ daa kpa lala karimzɔŋ ŋɔ. Bɛ daa zaŋ la [shikurubihi](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Shikuru "Shikuru") pia ni ayopɔin (17) m-pili [[shikuru ŋɔ, ka zaŋ tɛhisuma din nyɛ [baŋsim](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ba%C5%8Bsim_dunoli:Alaafei_mini_Tilahi "Baŋsim dunoli:Alaafei mini Tilahi") lɛbu dini ni di che ka bɛ lee [karimba](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Karimba_nima_dabisili "Karimba nima dabisili") maŋa n-wuhiri m mayaankalɛhi shikuriti. Bagabaga College of Education nyɛla shikuru shɛli din ba daansi ni [Sagnarigu Municipal Education](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sagnarigu_Municipal_Education "Sagnarigu Municipal Education") duu la yaɣili ni [Tamale Senior High School](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tamale_Senior_High_School "Tamale Senior High School") nti pahi Tamale Technical University karimzɔŋ kara la. [Bagabaga College of Education](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bagabaga_College_of_Education "Bagabaga College of Education") (BACE), [Tamale Technical University](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tamale_Technical_University "Tamale Technical University") [(TaTU)](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/\(TaTU\)?action=edit&redlink=1 "\(TaTU\) \(yaɣili ŋɔ maa kani\)"), [Tamale College of Education (TACE)](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tamale_College_of_Education\(TACE\) "Tamale College of Education\(TACE\)"), [Bagabaga Demonstration KG/PRIMARY/JHS](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bagabaga_Demonstration_KG/PRIMARY/JHS "Bagabaga Demonstration KG/PRIMARY/JHS") zaa ka bɛ laɣim boli [Education Ridge](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Education_Ridge "Education Ridge") la [Sagnarigu](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sagnarigu_Municipality "Sagnarigu Municipality") yaɣili la. [Bagabaga College of Education](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bagabaga_College_of_Education "Bagabaga College of Education") nyɛla karimzɔŋ shɛli din bɛ [University of Education, Winnebanima](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/University_of_Education,_Winneba "University of Education, Winneba") fukumsi ni. [Bagabaga College of Education](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bagabaga_College_of_Education "Bagabaga College of Education") nyɛla karimzɔŋ shɛli ban wumsi karimbanima pam ka bɛ be bolli ni yiɣ'jam yaɣili [Northern](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Northern_Region "Northern Region") tudu yaɣili. [Bagabaga College of Education](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bagabaga_College_of_Education "Bagabaga College of Education") nyɛla ban kpaŋdi bɛ maŋ pam zaŋ chaŋ karimba mini karimmanima bɔhimbu polo [......Karimmi pahi](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bagabaga_College_of_Education "Bagabaga College of Education")[Asanza lahabaya di pun gari](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Good_Articles?action=edit&redlink=1 "Wikipedia:Good Articles \(yaɣili ŋɔ maa kani\)") ![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/4/46/Bluebg_rounded.png) ![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/7/7c/Book_red%3B_question_marks.svg/40px-Book_red%3B_question_marks.svg.png) Ami Ni...? [![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/f/fc/Qur%27an_and_Rehal.jpg/250px-Qur%27an_and_Rehal.jpg)](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lahabali_k%C9%94ligu:Qur'an_and_Rehal.jpg)Alikuraan 
  * **[Alikuraan](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alikuraan "Alikuraan")** muni bɛla ti Dagbani Wikipedia ŋɔ zuɣu?
  * **[Dagbaŋ kurili saha yuya](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dagba%C5%8B_kurili_saha_yuya "Dagbaŋ kurili saha yuya")** galisiya pam?
  * **[Anabi Mahamaru](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Anabi_Mahamaru "Anabi Mahamaru")** nyɛla ninvuɣ'so ŋun nyɛ Anabinima bahigu. O laribu yuli n-nyɛ Aḥmad, Abū al-Qāsim Muḥammad ibn ʿAbd Allāh ibn ʿAbd al-Muṭṭalib ibn Hāshim Mahamaru ka be daa siɣsi Al Kurani n-ti?
  * **[Ghana Senior High School](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ghana_Senior_High_School "Ghana Senior High School")** (GHANASCO) nyɛla bi’kura karim zɔŋ shɛli din be Tamali Northern Region, Ghana tiŋgban ni ka n-nyɛ yuun' pihi yɔbu?[Asanza lahabaya di pun gari](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Did_You_Know?action=edit&redlink=1 "Wikipedia:Did You Know \(yaɣili ŋɔ maa kani\)")

|  Ni A Paabu Na ![⟨41⟩](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lahabali_k%C9%94ligu:Wikipedia-logo-v2-dag.svg) Wikipidia⟨42⟩! Baŋsim bayana kundi sokam ni tooi tɔhisabi. Lahabaya **24,269⟨43⟩** m-be Dagbanli⟨44⟩ bayana kundi ŋɔ ni. Alaafei mini Tilahi⟨45⟩ — Daadam biɛhagu⟨46⟩ — Salya karibu⟨47⟩ — Saŋmarisi baŋsim⟨48⟩ So biɛhigu karuŋ⟨49⟩ — Kurimbuni yɛltoɣa⟨50⟩ — Tabibi⟨51⟩ — Tabibi baŋsim⟨52⟩ Kundi ŋɔ lahi mali: Kpiɛriti⟨53⟩ — Salima⟨54⟩ — Shɛhira gbana⟨55⟩ — Yɛltɔɣataɣamalisi⟨56⟩ **-Lahabaya Zaa⟨57⟩ -**  
---  
  

|  ![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/4/46/Bluebg_rounded.png) ![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/f/fd/HSutvald2.svg/40px-HSutvald2.svg.png) Asanza Lahabali ![⟨58⟩](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lahabali_k%C9%94ligu:A_Dagomba_couple_from_farm_01.jpg)Paɣa ni Doo **Dagbamba⟨59⟩** nyɛla zuliya ban be tudu yaɣili⟨60⟩. Dagbamba ni yɛri bal'shɛli n nyɛ dagbanli. Bɛ mini Mohi⟨61⟩ kpɛriti pam (dachɛhi n nyɛ ba). Dagbamba Naa n-nyɛ Yaa naa⟨62⟩, ŋuni nyɛ dagbaŋ'na zuɣu ŋun be Naya-Sankarayili(Yendi⟨63⟩) n-lɛhiri Nabihi dagbaŋ. Dagbamba mali yu'gahinda⟨64⟩ pam ka di mali salima. Be mali tuma balibu pam ka bi booni li Daan' kali tuma⟨65⟩ Dagbaŋ tiŋsi⟨66⟩ zaa mali la di yuya ni di Salima ni dahi⟨67⟩. Be mali bindiri'⟨68⟩ suma ni shikuru⟨69⟩ gahinda.  ...Karimmi pahi⟨59⟩Asanza lahabaya di pun gari⟨70⟩ ![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/4/46/Bluebg_rounded.png) ![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/7/7e/HSbra2.svg/40px-HSbra2.svg.png) Lahabali Din Gahim ![⟨71⟩](https://dag.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lahabali_k%C9%94ligu:A_dagomba_man_dancing_baamaya.jpg)Baamaaya **Bagabaga College of Education**(bɛ ni daa mi shɛli Bagabaga Training College⟨72⟩, bee BATCO la) nyɛla karimzɔŋ⟨73⟩ karili din be Tamale⟨74⟩ (Sagnarigu Municipality⟨75⟩, Northern region⟨60⟩, Ghana) n-wumisiri karimbanimaKarimzɔŋ maa nyɛla din be Northern⟨60⟩ zone la ni. Di nyɛla Ghana tingbani⟨76⟩ ŋɔ ni karimbanima karim zɔndi din kalinli yiɣisi kaman pihinahi ni ayɔbu (46) la puuni yini. Silimiingoli⟨77⟩ January biɛɣu pihita ni yini dali (31 st),1944 yuuni ka bɛ daa kpa lala karimzɔŋ ŋɔ. Bɛ daa zaŋ la shikurubihi⟨78⟩ pia ni ayopɔin (17) m-pili [shikuru ŋɔ, ka zaŋ tɛhisuma din nyɛ [baŋsim⟨45⟩ lɛbu dini ni di che ka bɛ lee karimba⟨79⟩ maŋa n-wuhiri m mayaankalɛhi shikuriti. Bagabaga College of Education nyɛla shikuru shɛli din ba daansi ni Sagnarigu Municipal Education⟨80⟩ duu la yaɣili ni Tamale Senior High School⟨81⟩ nti pahi Tamale Technical University karimzɔŋ kara la. Bagabaga College of Education⟨82⟩ (BACE), Tamale Technical University⟨83⟩ (TaTU)⟨84⟩?action=edit&redlink=1 "\(TaTU\) \(yaɣili ŋɔ maa kani\)"), Tamale College of Education (TACE)⟨85⟩ "Tamale College of Education\(TACE\)"), Bagabaga Demonstration KG/PRIMARY/JHS⟨86⟩ zaa ka bɛ laɣim boli Education Ridge⟨87⟩ la Sagnarigu⟨75⟩ yaɣili la. Bagabaga College of Education⟨82⟩ nyɛla karimzɔŋ shɛli din bɛ University of Education, Winnebanima⟨88⟩ fukumsi ni. Bagabaga College of Education⟨82⟩ nyɛla karimzɔŋ shɛli ban wumsi karimbanima pam ka bɛ be bolli ni yiɣ'jam yaɣili Northern⟨60⟩ tudu yaɣili.
